text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and Haru Urara are at the academy
gates, getting ready to head out.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hi, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hi, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I get to hang out with Rice! We're going to
an all-you-can-eat dessert buffet!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey! You should come along too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I bet Rice will have even more fun this way!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I-if you don't mind, that is...
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll gladly join.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I-if you don't mind, that is...
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll gladly join.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that great, Rice? All right, let's get this show
on the road!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Look at all these yummy desserts! There's
so many different kinds, it's incredible! Like
super-duper incredible!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-we can eat all of these? This is amazing, Big
Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-we can eat all of these? This is amazing, Big
Sister!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Rice, let's gooo! I can't hold back
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two excitedly head off to grab some desserts.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I got so much! What about you, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry to make you wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower returns with more than double the
amount that Haru Urara took!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Rice! You took sooo much!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You think so? I-is it too much? It's too much, isn't
it? This isn't healthy.
choice_data_list:
We can run it off later! It's just fuel for the
body!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You think so? I-is it too much? It's too much, isn't
it? This isn't healthy.
choice_data_list:
We can run it off later! It's just fuel for the
body!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! We'll eat a ton and then exercise a
ton!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah. As long as we're exercising afterward... it
should be fine.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Time to destroy these carrot cakes! Let's eat!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Munch...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪ It's so good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower proceeds to deftly down her heaping
plate, enjoying each bite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not one to lose, I fill my plate with about as much
as Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa, your trainer's on a whole nother level!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right! That just means I have to eat more too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara comes back with even more desserts!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You can't even see the table anymore.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Just looking at it all makes me so happy!
Now, let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-bon appétit!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Munch...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪ It's so good!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... ♪ That was so yummy...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, super yummy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And now... my tummy is full... and I'm beat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Haru Urara is so stuffed she can hardly
move, Rice Shower just smiles happily.
